# Dia Browser Security & Documentation

## Security Features

**Prompt Injection Defenses:**
- Dia won't open or follow LLM-generated URLs to prevent data exfiltration
- Dia won't allow tools beyond what user intends to use; chat starts with no access to other tabs
- Blocks insertion of data into third-party sites without user approval
- Prevents irreversible actions; calendar events remain in draft until confirmed
- Dia won't run agentic mode on unapproved context
- Restricts agent navigation to other websites to limit blast radius
- Hides sensitive form fields and irreversible action buttons from the agent
- Filters URLs to prevent hidden instructions from influencing AI

**Browser Security:**
- Built on Chromium engine with inherited security patches
- Weekly updates every Thursday with latest stable Chromium
- Critical patches deployed within 48 hours of Google release
- Disabled Google Accounts Integration (GAIA)
- Disabled Google metrics (UMA) reporting

**Data Protection:**
- Conversations and files stored locally encrypted on device
- Minimum necessary data briefly sent to trusted AI partners
- De-identified content data retained maximum 30 days then deleted
- Incognito mode stores nothing
- AI partners prohibited from training on or retaining user data

**Infrastructure:**
- Role-based production access restrictions
- Data encrypted at rest and in transit
- Regular independent security audits and assessments
- Annual full-scope audits with independent firms; point-in-time reviews for new/high-risk features
- Security Bulletins published for notable findings

**Bug Bounty Program:** Operates through HackerOne (https://hackerone.com/bcny)

## Last Fetched
2026-04-05 - No changes detected from previous fetch.
